'''âl-n-m''' ('''kalanam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chance|chance]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-n-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chance|chance]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-n-m
|-
! Lemma
| kalanam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilanam|thilanam]] || [[word:jilanam|jilanam]] || [[word:shilanam|shilanam]] || [[word:kilanam|kilanam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulanam|thuthulanam]] || [[word:jujulanam|jujulanam]] || [[word:shushulanam|shushulanam]] || [[word:kukulanam|kukulanam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulanam|thulanam]] || [[word:julanam|julanam]] || [[word:shulanam|shulanam]] || [[word:kulanam|kulanam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulanam|thulanam]] || [[word:julanam|julanam]] || [[word:shulanam|shulanam]] || [[word:kulanam|kulanam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelanam|thelanam]] || [[word:jelanam|jelanam]] || [[word:shelanam|shelanam]] || [[word:kelanam|kelanam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholanam|thotholanam]] || [[word:jojolanam|jojolanam]] || [[word:shosholanam|shosholanam]] || [[word:kokolanam|kokolanam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholanam|tholanam]] || [[word:jolanam|jolanam]] || [[word:sholanam|sholanam]] || [[word:kolanam|kolanam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholanam|tholanam]] || [[word:jolanam|jolanam]] || [[word:sholanam|sholanam]] || [[word:kolanam|kolanam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlanam|thĂŠlanam]] || [[word:jĂŠlanam|jĂŠlanam]] || [[word:shĂŠlanam|shĂŠlanam]] || [[word:kĂŠlanam|kĂŠlanam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalanam|thathalanam]] || [[word:jajalanam|jajalanam]] || [[word:shashalanam|shashalanam]] || [[word:kakalanam|kakalanam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalanam|thalanam]] || [[word:jalanam|jalanam]] || [[word:shalanam|shalanam]] || [[word:kalanam|kalanam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalanam|thalanam]] || [[word:jalanam|jalanam]] || [[word:shalanam|shalanam]] || [[word:kalanam|kalanam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalanam|shalanam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalanam|goshalanam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalanam|gokishalanam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalanamnĂŒ|shalanamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalanamnknĂŒ|goshalanamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalanamnĂŒ|gokishalanamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalanamshĂ«|shalanamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalanamnkshĂ«|goshalanamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalanamshĂ«|gokishalanamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalanamro|shalanamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalanamnkro|goshalanamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalanamro|gokishalanamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalanamu|shalanamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalanamnkmu|goshalanamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalanamu|gokishalanamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalanamsher|shalanamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalanamnksher|goshalanamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalanamsher|gokishalanamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalanamng|shalanamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalanamnkng|goshalanamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalanamng|gokishalanamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalanamya|shalanamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalanamnkya|goshalanamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalanamya|gokishalanamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalanamyam|shalanamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalanamnkyam|goshalanamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalanamyam|gokishalanamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalanamnĂŒshĂ«|shalanamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalanamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshalanamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalanamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishalanamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalanamnĂŒro|shalanamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalanamnknĂŒro|goshalanamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalanamnĂŒro|gokishalanamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalanamnĂŒmu|shalanamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalanamnknĂŒmu|goshalanamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalanamnĂŒmu|gokishalanamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalanamshĂ«nĂŒ|shalanamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalanamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshalanamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalanamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishalanamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalanamshĂ«ro|shalanamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalanamnkshĂ«ro|goshalanamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalanamshĂ«ro|gokishalanamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalanamshĂ«mu|shalanamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalanamnkshĂ«mu|goshalanamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalanamshĂ«mu|gokishalanamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalanamronĂŒ|shalanamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalanamnkronĂŒ|goshalanamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalanamronĂŒ|gokishalanamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalanamroshĂ«|shalanamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalanamnkroshĂ«|goshalanamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalanamroshĂ«|gokishalanamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalanamromu|shalanamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalanamnkromu|goshalanamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalanamromu|gokishalanamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalanamunĂŒ|shalanamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalanamnkmunĂŒ|goshalanamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalanamunĂŒ|gokishalanamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalanamushĂ«|shalanamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalanamnkmushĂ«|goshalanamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalanamushĂ«|gokishalanamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalanamuro|shalanamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalanamnkmuro|goshalanamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalanamuro|gokishalanamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
